## Summary

-

## Tests

- [ ] I ran `make test` or documented why it is not applicable.
- [ ] I included test output or a clear verification note.

## Docs

- [ ] I updated README, docs, swagger, changelog, or AI memory when behavior changed.
- [ ] No documentation update is needed.

## Security

- [ ] I considered authentication, authorization, RBAC, data exposure, secrets, and dependency impact.
- [ ] No security-sensitive behavior changed.

## Release

- [ ] I considered database/config migrations, image tag, deployment order, rollback, and compatibility.
- [ ] No release note is needed.
